title: alchemilla hybrida var. radiisecta
intro: Alchemilla hybrida var. radiisecta, also known as Lady's Mantle, is a flowering plant species in the family Rosaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Alchemilla hybrida var. radiisecta include reducing menstrual cramps and heavy bleeding, as well as soothing digestive issues and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal benefits.
